message:
test(fuse_e2e): add xattr size limit and boundary E2E tests (bd-7xfny)

Add 8 new tests covering xattr name and value size limits:

ext4:
- fuse_xattr_ext4_name_too_long_reports_enametoolong
- fuse_xattr_ext4_value_too_large_reports_einval
- fuse_xattr_ext4_boundary_name_length_accepted
- fuse_xattr_ext4_boundary_value_size_accepted

btrfs:
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_name_too_long_reports_enametoolong
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_value_too_large_reports_einval
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_boundary_name_length_accepted
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_boundary_value_size_accepted

Tests verify:
- Names > 255 bytes return ENAMETOOLONG
- Values > 64KB return EINVAL
- 255-byte names and 64KB values round-trip correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
